title: safety.viz results-over-time data contract
description: Long-format results data with a visit dimension: one record per participant per visit per measure (SROT-DATA-001/002). Column names are supplied by the settings mapping; the renderer removes missing/non-numeric results with a reported count and degrades gracefully when optional columns are absent.

data.description: d3.csv()-style records; every row carries the measure, result, and visit columns named in settings.

settings.description: Column mappings and rendering options; merged onto the module's DEFAULT_SETTINGS, so only overrides need to be supplied.

measure_col.description: Column holding the measure name; required in data.

value_col.description: Column holding the numeric result; required in data.

time_col.description: Column holding the visit name; required in data. Distinct visits become the x-axis categories.

time_order_col.description: Optional numeric column ordering the visits; falls back to alphanumeric order when absent.

id_col.description: Optional participant identifier column driving the participant counts.

unit_col.description: Optional unit column, appended to measure labels and the y-axis title.

filters.description: Optional filter columns rendered as controls.

groups.description: Optional group-by columns that split each visit into side-by-side box plots.
